<!--
Use a Conventional Commit style title on creation:
feat(slicing): add adaptive layer thickness strategy
fix(gcode): correct extrusion rate overflow
refactor(geometry): simplify polygon stitcher

If breaking change, add ! after type (feat!:) and document impact below.
-->

## Summary

Briefly state WHAT this PR does and WHY (problem + approach).

## Context / Motivation

Link issues, tickets, prior discussions. Note constraints or key design decisions.

## Changes

- Bullet list of key changes (APIs, algorithms, data structures, UI elements)
- Note any removed or deprecated functionality

## Breaking Changes (if any)

Surface impact, migration steps, affected modules.

## Testing

Describe manual + automated validation: commands run, sample files sliced, edge cases.

## Performance (if relevant)

Observed impact (e.g., slice time -12%, memory +8%). Include methodology.

## Documentation

List added/updated Doxygen blocks or user docs pages.

## Outstanding / Follow-ups (optional)

Deferred items (scope control) with links/issues.

## Review Notes (optional)

Call out areas needing focused attention or potential risk.

<!-- Checklist (maintainer/useful):
- [ ] Branch naming follows convention
- [ ] Conventional Commits adhered to
- [ ] clang-format applied
- [ ] Public APIs documented
- [ ] Tests added/updated or rationale provided
- [ ] Rebased on latest develop
- [ ] No stray debug / commented code
-->
